title: Reviewer bugbot security risk triggers
purpose: B2.5 defines reviewer bugbot security risk triggers for the agent-driven expert system. Cognition & routing — [S0](B1.1-s0-deterministic-mandatory-first.md)–S4, conductor, workers, dual-stack.
scope: Owns `B2.5` only; siblings under `B2` must not duplicate this spec.
Aligns with minimal HITL: H1 plan, H2 blocker, H3 sign-off ([INTRO-1.2](INTRO-1.2-human-touchpoint-contract-h1-h2-h3.md)).
Conflicts resolve in favor of [Vision §4 — Branch B — Cognition & routing plane](../../full-automation-vision-and-hierarchy.md#4-branch-b-cognition-routing-plane).
behavior_steps: After substantial implement diffs or when pack policy flags risk, the conductor spawns readonly reviewer workers—Bugbot for branch changes, security-review for touch paths and dependencies.
Reviewer findings return as bounded summaries; reviewers do not dual-write pursuit state and cannot clear gates or advance `next_action` on their own.
Review complements [B2.4](B2.4-verifier-tool-operator-evidence.md) evidence: verify-router proves commands ran; reviewers detect mistake classes from Plane G before push.
In strict mode the conductor blocks git-workflow until reviewer pass; in default self-gate mode findings may be recorded as waivable with expiry when automatable checks pass.
Critical or unresolved reviewer findings route to H2 or [B1.5](B1.5-s4-governance-escalation-h2-packaging.md) rather than merging to main or requesting H3 sign-off.

Concurrent manual edit to queue JSON â€” conductor reloads queue each wake; last writer wins with journal note.
Edge case `B2.5` variant 3: verify state dual-write before continuing pursuit.
Edge case `B2.5` variant 4: verify state dual-write before continuing pursuit.
Pass 3: add regression test or evidence path specific to `B2.5`.
Pass 3: cross-link related nodes in same branch index.
failure_modes: **Silent stop:** Agent ends turn without updating queue â†’ mitigated by /loop + check-hierarchy-queue.py EMPTY gate.
**False complete:** Item marked done without artifact â†’ audit-hierarchy-depth.py re-enqueues deepen pass.
**Scope bleed:** Worker edits journal/state during planning-only expansion â†’ forbidden in vision-expansion-prompt.
**Stale design:** Upstream vision Â§ changes â†’ reconcile-stale adds deepen items for affected ids.
implementation: Map `B2.5` to v2.14â€“v2.23 release row in SEC-15-index.md.
Create or extend S0 script if behavior is file-derived.
Add unit test under tests/unit/test_b2_5.py when script exists.
Validate `B2.5` against SEC-15 release checklist and parent index links.
Document `B2.5` in parent index with verify command and release tag.
Add checklist row in SEC-15 release doc for `B2.5`.
acceptance: [ ] Named script, skill, or test path exists or is listed in SEC-15 release row
narrative: B2.5 defines reviewer bugbot security risk triggers for the agent-driven expert system. Cognition & routing — [S0](B1.1-s0-deterministic-mandatory-first.md)–S4, conductor, workers, dual-stack. In practice, the system after substantial implement diffs or when pack policy flags risk, the conductor spawns readonly reviewer workers—bugbot for branch changes, security-review for touch paths and dependencies, then reviewer findings return as bounded summaries; reviewers do not dual-write pursuit state and cannot clear gates or advance `next_action` on their own.
reader_narrative:
<!-- prose-source: agent plane-b 2026-06-28 -->

Reviewer workers run on triggers: Bugbot after substantial implement diffs, security-review when policy flags risk, risk-class controls from Plane G. They are readonly with respect to pursuit state—findings go to the conductor for merge or H2.

Review does not replace verify-router evidence; it adds mistake-class detection before push. Strict mode may require reviewer pass before git-workflow; default self-gate records findings as waivable with expiry when automatable checks pass.
